[Sages view (visualize) the knowledge. Others only remember,

sages should be considered authentic than that of others]
Because of this for us also it is good to accept that 8th
Yama does not have any lord associated with.
It should also be noted that as per Prasnamarga last yama
is owned by Rahu and the distribution ofYamas is as follows.
